article.title: Contributing to the #KotlinPhotoContest
article.author: Matt McKenna
article.excerpt: Recently @mreichelt on Twitter had the great idea to create some free-to-use images of Kotlin for the community. These are my submissions!

authors.bio:
Hi I'm Matt! I spend my days typing on a keyboard creating things for our favorite 
green robot and battling build time boredom.
authors.name: Matt McKenna
